description: End of a legal document. Involves Dalāl bt. Yaʿaqov. Signed by David b. ʿAmram ha-Kohen and Elʿazar b. Saʿadya. The qiyyum is written and signed by Yehuda b. Ṭuviyyahu ha-Kohen he-Ḥaver (active in Bilbays ca. 1172–1218) and [...] b. Yakhin ha-Kohen. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
